creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
On amd64 10.2-release, using exlusively pkg I get this:

# pkg check -d taucs
Checking taucs: 100%
taucs has a missing dependency: metis4

>>> Missing package dependencies were detected.
>>> Found 1 issue(s) in the package database.

pkg: No packages available to install matching 'metis4' have been found in the repositories
>>> Summary of actions performed:

metis4 dependency failed to be fixed

>>> There are still missing dependencies.
>>> You are advised to try fixing them manually.

>>> Also make sure to check 'pkg updating' for known issues.
